discoveries.name: Trade Route
discoveries.description: Unlocks the Trade widget — 1:1 swap of wood/stone/gold with any non-enemy faction.

discoveries.name: Cartography
discoveries.description: Reveals the starting region around your base + boosts Ferryman speed by 25%.

discoveries.name: Iron Tools
discoveries.description: +25% Peon harvest rate (stacks with Steel Plows).

discoveries.name: Siege Engineering
discoveries.description: Trebuchet trainable from a tier-1 Barracks instead of tier-2.

discoveries.name: Formation: Phalanx
discoveries.description: Unlocks the Phalanx formation — spear stacks gain +50% defense.

discoveries.name: Formation: Cadre
discoveries.description: Unlocks the Cadre formation — melee stacks gain +25% damage.

discoveries.name: Formation: Wedge
discoveries.description: Unlocks the Wedge formation — heavy cavalry stacks gain +25% damage on the first attack.

discoveries.name: Formation: Skirmish Line
discoveries.description: Unlocks the Skirmish Line formation — ranged stacks gain +15% range.

discoveries.name: Formation: Square
discoveries.description: Unlocks the Square formation — defensive stacks gain +30% defense; cannot move while in formation.

discoveries.name: Formation: Combined Arms
discoveries.description: Unlocks the Combined Arms formation — mixed melee+ranged stacks gain +25% HP and +20% damage.
